Frodo the narrator's pet?

A stranger roll up in town, link up with the fine young thang Susan Martinez De La Cruz, and they slide to a barbecue. Over there, rich dude Jason Carberry droppin' some words for Robin Randall who just got popped. Jason ain’t feeling the stranger being there, since he look out for Susan like that. He try to set it off with a duel, but the stranger got his piece out before Jason even got his hand on his. Calaveras Kate, who be singing at the saloon and got eyes for Jason, she sigh in relief when the stranger ain’t pull the trigger. Outta nowhere, Rafael Moreno pull up on a horse, starting beef with the stranger. They throwing hands till Judge Wallace Wintrop and his niece Sheila show up from back East, tired of all the wilding out West. Come to find out, the stranger is Reb Randall, the dead dude’s brother. He on the hunt for the killer, who might be Rafael, Jason, or even Billy Buckett, the county's punk. The ladies holding their breath, hoping they men make it out alive. When Jason check the stranger who be relieved at the end and why?
text_b: She ain’t want her Uncle to die.
